title: Software Engineer - Fresher
description:
You will be joining Techgardlabs, a company that specializes in cloud-based mobile testing to ensure seamless performance of mobile apps across different platforms. By conducting tests on real hardware, we provide precise insights and results, enabling you to unlock the full potential of your mobile applications.

As a Software Engineer-Fresher in a full-time remote position, your primary responsibilities will include developing and maintaining software applications, engaging in backend web development, executing programming tasks, and upholding object-oriented programming (OOP) principles. Collaboration with diverse teams and contribution to various software development projects will also be expected from you.

Qualifications:
- Foundational knowledge in Computer Science
- Experience and skills in Back-End Web Development and Software Development
- Proficiency in Programming and Object-Oriented Programming (OOP)
- Strong analytical and problem-solving abilities
- Excellent communication and teamwork skills
- Bachelors degree in Computer Science, Software Engineering, or a related field
- Ability to work independently and manage time effectively in a remote work environment
- Passion for learning and adapting to new technologies
- Experience with version control systems like Git is a plus You will be joining Techgardlabs, a company that specializes in cloud-based mobile testing to ensure seamless performance of mobile apps across different platforms. By conducting tests on real hardware, we provide precise insights and results, enabling you to unlock the full potential of your mobile applications.

As a Software Engineer-Fresher in a full-time remote position, your primary responsibilities will include developing and maintaining software applications, engaging in backend web development, executing programming tasks, and upholding object-oriented programming (OOP) principles. Collaboration with diverse teams and contribution to various software development projects will also be expected from you.

Qualifications:
- Foundational knowledge in Computer Science
- Experience and skills in Back-End Web Development and Software Development
- Proficiency in Programming and Object-Oriented Programming (OOP)
- Strong analytical and problem-solving abilities
- Excellent communication and teamwork skills
- Bachelors degree in Computer Science, Software Engineering, or a related field
- Ability to work independently and manage time effectively in a remote work environment
- Passion for learning and adapting to new technologies
- Experience with version control systems like Git is a plus

title: Senior Java Backend Developer (J2EE, Docker) (6 to 10 Years)- Gurgaon/ Pune/Bangalore
description:
Position Type :
Full time

Type Of Hire :
Experienced (relevant combo of work and education)

Job Description for Java developer (Banking / Payments)

Are you curious, motivated, and forward-thinking? At FIS you’ll have the opportunity to work on some of the most challenging and relevant issues in financial services and technology. Our talented people empower us, and we believe in being part of a team that is open, collaborative, entrepreneurial, passionate and above all fun.

About the team

This role is a part of our OPF team. FIS Open Payment Framework (OPF) is a set of reusable and extensible components, frameworks, and technical services which can be assembled in different configurations to build a personalized Payment Processing System. From the Open Payment Framework, FIS has created predefined solutions around the bank payment hub, including Domestic & International payments (XCT), SEPA Direct Debits & CreditTransfers (SEPA), SCT INST , UK Faster Payments, Immediate Payments, eBanking (EBK), Business Payments (BP), NPP, BACS, US ACH.

What you will be doing
• Develop and maintain complex programs
• Work with Business Analyst to understand business problems and rewrite them into fast and efficient solutions that ultimately help our customers.
• Designing, coding, and debugging and maintenance of Java, J2EE application systems.
• Evaluate and identify new technologies for implementation.
• Perform peer code review and mentor junior team members.

What you bring:
• Must have 6+ years of experience in J2EE Technologies.
• Proficiency in Core Java (Collections, Concurrency/Multi-Threading, Localization, JDBC), J2EE, ANSI SQL, XML, Struts, Hibernate, Spring, EJB, Messaging using JMS, Unit & integration testing, Linux.
• Good experience in Database concepts (Oracle/DB2) and Build tools e.g. Maven, Gradle
• Good experience of Docker, Kubernetes, Microservices
• Hands on experience in Web Technologies (Spring, Hibernate, JSP, HTML/DHTML, Web services, JavaScript)
• Must have knowledge of one J2EE Application Server e.g. WebSphere Application Server, WebLogic, Jboss.
• Sound knowledge of Git, SVN, Jenkins
• Working Knowledge of JIRA or equivalent.
• Sound analytical & communication skills
• Sound debugging skills & hands on knowledge of industry standard tools such as eclipse, SOAP UI, postman etc.

Good to have skills includes
• Production Support and maintenance experience
• Knowledge of FIS’ products and services.
• Knowledge of financial services industry.
• Worked on using AI tools - CoPilot
• Experience of AI Agents, tools. Adaptation and using AI in day-to-day work.

Qualifications
• Degree or equivalent

Competencies
• Excellent communicator – ability to discuss technical and commercial solutions to internal and external parties and adapt depending on the technical or business focus of the discussion
• Attention to detail – track record of authoring high quality documentation
• Organized approach – manage and adapt priorities according to client and internal requirements
• Self-starter but team mindset - work autonomously and as part of a global team

What we offer you
• A multifaceted job with a high degree of responsibility and a broad spectrum of opportunities
• A broad range of professional education and personal development possibilities – FIS is your final career step!
• A competitive salary and benefits
• A variety of career development tools, resources and opportunities

With a 50-year history rooted in the financial services industry, FIS™ is the world's largest global provider dedicated to financial technology solutions. We champion clients from banking to capital markets, retail to corporate and everything touched by financial services. Headquartered in Jacksonville, Florida, our 53,000 worldwide employees help serve more than 20,000 clients in over 130 countries. Our technology powers billions of transactions annually that move over $9 trillion around the globe. FIS is a Fortune 500 company and is a member of Standard & Poor’s 500® Index.

Privacy Statement

FIS is committed to protecting the privacy and security of all personal information that we process in order to provide services to our clients. For specific information on how FIS protects personal information online, please see the Online Privacy Notice.

Sourcing Model

Recruitment at FIS works primarily on a direct sourcing model; a relatively small portion of our hiring is through recruitment agencies. FIS does not accept resumes from recruitment agencies which are not on the preferred supplier list and is not responsible for any related fees for resumes submitted to job postings, our employees, or any other part of our company.

title: GRADUATE ENGINEER TRAINEE
description:
Job Description Summary

Job Description

Position: Manufacturing Process & Quality Engineer Trainee.

Qualification requirements: B.E/B.Tech. Graduate, Mechanical Engineer

Primary Roles & Responsibilities
• Resolve quality issues of the line.
• Ensure all Equipment Calibration activities are done as per schedule.
• Review and maintain Calibration reports.
• Carry out Verification and Validation activities related to equipments & production processes.
• Prepare Validation reports and Verification Reports.
• Support Equipment installation and maintenance activities.
• Support ordering Tools and equipment’s for manufacturing.
• Support clearance of non-conforming material reports from the production line on a daily and Weekly basis.
• Manage Non confirming products area.
• Work with Cross functional team and supplier quality engineering team for problem solving and manage rejected materials.
• Support Supplier follow up for part rejections and rework activities with supplier and Production Line.
• Support preparation of work instructions & maintain revision history.
• Support preparation of Device History Records & maintain revision history.
• Support engineering change communications and document distributions across cross-functional teams.
• Training of manufacturing team on the changes in work instructions.
• Develop solutions for quality, Cot, and Productivity issues.
• Own EHS element as support member.
• Support in maintaining inventory of Capital Goods & ensure good tractability.
• Execute Poke Yoke projects related to jigs & fixtures to simplify the manufacturing process.
• Support implementation of Kaizen across the manufacturing lines.
• Support the manufacturing team in driving Lean Action Work Outs across the site.

Work experience: Fresh Graduates or up to One year of relevant experience.

Other relevant responsibilities:
• Compliance to site QMS procedures and Work instructions
• Compliance to Site EHS policies and procedures
• Ensure compliance to site HR & Admin policies.

Additional Information

Relocation Assistance Provided: No

Participates as a member of project team of other software systems engineers and internal and outsourced development partners to develop reliable, cost effective and high-quality solutions for assigned systems portion or subsystem.

Analyze, design and determines coding, programming, and integration activities required based on business requirement.

Executes and writes portions of testing plans (unit testing) and prepare documentation

Identify and debugs issues with code and suggests changes or improvements.

Collaborates and communicates with internal and outsourced development partners regarding software systems design status, project progress, and issue resolution.

title: Front End Developer in Bangalore, Kerala Estate, Chennai, Hyderabad, Mumbai, Delhi (Hybrid)
company: Velozity Global Solutions India Pvt. Ltd.
description:
As a Front End Developer at Velozity Global Solutions, you will have the opportunity to showcase your expertise in Frontend development, HTML, CSS, JavaScript, jQuery, Bootstrap, AngularJS, Node.js, React, REST API, Redux, and Bubble.io. We are seeking a talented individual who is passionate about creating visually appealing and user-friendly interfaces for our clients.

Key Responsibilities
• Collaborate with the design team to translate UI/UX designs into code.
• Develop and implement front-end architecture to support user-facing features.
• Optimize applications for maximum speed and scalability.
• Utilize modern technologies and frameworks to enhance user experience.
• Troubleshoot and resolve bugs to ensure seamless functionality.
• Stay updated on industry trends and best practices to continuously improve our products.
• Work closely with back-end developers to integrate front-end components with server-side logic.

If you are a proactive problem-solver with a keen eye for detail and a passion for innovation, we invite you to join our dynamic team at Velozity Global Solutions. This is an exciting opportunity to contribute to cutting-edge projects and make a significant impact in the digital landscape. Apply now and be a part of our growing success story!

About Company: Velozity Global Solutions is not only a globally recognized IT company, but it's also a family representing togetherness for over two years of a successful journey. For Velozity, the definition of success is to transform innovative ideas of people into reality with the help of our tech expertise - this is what we as a team want to be remembered for. Our vision has led Velozity to become an emerging IT company in India & the USA for delivering industry-led mobility solutions. The goal is to empower clients and businesses by creating new possibilities leveraging the technologies of today and tomorrow with the utmost quality, satisfaction, and transparency. Our enthusiasm has led us to become a top IT company in India & the USA for delivering various industry-led mobility solutions in web and mobile application development domains, leveraging futuristic technologies like the Internet of Things (IoT), AI-ML, AR-VR, voice assistants, and voice skills, DevOps & cloud computing, etc.

title: Graduate Engineering Trainee
description:
We are hiring Graduate Engineering Trainees (GETs) from the 2025 batch to join our Green Ammonia team, contributing to cutting-edge projects in the energy transition space.

This is a unique opportunity to be part of next-generation sustainable energy solutions, working on large-scale Green Ammonia and Green Hydrogen initiatives.

Eligibility Criteria

B.E./B.Tech (2025 pass-outs) in:
• Chemical Engineering
• Mechanical Engineering
• Electrical Engineering
• Instrumentation Engineering
• Civil Engineering
• Electronics & Communication Engineering
Strong academic performance

Good communication and analytical skills

High learning agility and interest in clean energy technologies

Role Overview: Will work closely with the Green Ammonia project team, supporting engineering design, project execution, and commissioning activities, while contributing to process engineering, utilities, and plant systems, and collaborating with multidisciplinary teams across EPC and operations.

Location: Gurgaon, Haryana

Why Join Us
• Work on future-ready Green Ammonia & Hydrogen projects
• Exposure to large-scale EPC and process plant environment
• Mentorship from industry experts
• Strong career growth in the clean energy sector
